hero.headline: Designing Logic, Coding Creativity.
hero.subtitle: Merging technical expertise in C++, Java, & Python with 5-star creative design skills.

about.roleTitle: MD. MOHSIN - Graphics Designer & Computer Science Student at DIU
bioParagraphs: I am Md. Mohsin, currently in my last semester maintaining a strong academic record. I bridge the gap between logic and art.
Skilled in C++, Java, and Python, I’ve excelled in coding contests and led impactful projects like Buskoi, Utshobkori, and Niramoy.
Simultaneously, I am a Level 1 Graphic Designer (5 Stars on Fiverr) with a growing interest in motion graphics. I am known for honesty, leadership, and delivering creative solutions.

education.description: Currently completing my Bachelor's in Computer Science and Engineering. Maintaining a strong academic record while leading projects in C++, Java, and Python.
Completed college education with a focus on Science.
Early academic foundation with a perfect score.

projects.title: MIZAN APP
projects.stack: React 19 • TypeScript • Firebase • Tailwind CSS v4 • Google GenAI
projects.description: Mizan is a holistic, AI-powered lifestyle and productivity web application designed to help users harmonize their spiritual practices, physical health, and career goals. Built with React, TypeScript, and Firebase, Mizan features geo-aware prayer timing algorithms, custom workout and nutrition engines, streak-based gamification, and AI-driven behavioral analytics powered by Google Gemini to deliver personalized insights across all pillars of daily life.

projects.description: A real-time bus tracking application for university students.

projects.title: Utshobkori

experience.description: I have 3 years of experience in graphic design, particularly known as an Expert Thumbnail Designer.
Started my Fiverr journey with impactful results. My services include high-end Thumbnail Design, Parallax Animation, and Photo Art Gallery creation.
